steps.title: Focus on contrast
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two protest songs. The notes show the key difference: Poor Miner's Farewell exposed coal miners' wages and working conditions, while Bring Him Back Home called for Nelson Mandela's release.

steps.title: Reject noncontrasts
steps.content: Choice B discusses only Bring Him Back Home. Choice C names a similarity between the songs rather than a contrast. Choice D discusses only Poor Miner's Farewell. The answer is A.
